channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Luciana Ojeniyi Uses AI to Revolutionize Nigerian Fashion E-Commerce
item.description: Luciana Ojeniyi, a former corporate sales leader, launched Luciana Womenswear, Nigeria's first AI-powered virtual try-on platform for e-commerce. The brand addresses the common issue of online shopper...

item.title: Editors Guild Condemns Attacks on Media During Youth Protests, Calls for Fair Reporting
item.description: The Editors Guild of India has condemned the attacks on media personnel during youth protests, emphasizing that biased reporting cannot justify such violence. The guild issued a statement after videos...

item.title: Google faces €890 million EU fine for anti-competitive app store and search practices
item.description: Google has been fined a total of €890 million (A$1.45 billion) by the European Commission for violating EU regulations aimed at curbing the power of Big Tech. The penalties, under the Digital Markets ...

item.title: AMD Launches New AI Hardware to Compete with Nvidia in Data Center Market
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is set to unveil its next-generation AI hardware at an event in San Francisco, aiming to challenge Nvidia's dominance in the data centre chip sector. The company plans to ...

item.title: ServiceNow invests $40M in BusinessNext to boost AI-driven financial services expansion
item.description: ServiceNow, a U.S. enterprise software company specializing in workflow automation, has invested $40 million in BusinessNext, an Indian banking software firm valued at $700 million. This partnership a...

item.title: Spaza Shop Funding Support Programme Launched in South Africa
item.description: The Department of Small Business Development (DSBD) has launched the Spaza Shop Support Fund to assist eligible spaza shops and food-handling outlets across South Africa. The initiative, introduced in...

item.title: Dasmariñas City provides P50 million to Comelec to help fund August 29 special congressional elections
item.description: The Dasmariñas City government in Cavite has donated P50 million to the Commission on Elections (Comelec) to support the conduct of the special elections in the city's lone congressional district sche...

item.title: Tanzania Pushes for Global AI Regulations and Unveils Lake Victoria Fisheries Initiative
item.description: Tanzania has called for the establishment of global guidelines to ensure the responsible use of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, emphasizing the need for international cooperation to address...

item.title: Contempt Charges Against Barrister Threaten Legal Representation in Palestine Action Trial
item.description: The article discusses the legal controversy surrounding barrister Rajiv Menon KC, who faces contempt charges for his closing speech to a jury in a Palestine Action criminal damage trial. The case high...

item.title: Celebrities and WWE: Alexa Bliss Discusses Physical Demands of Professional Wrestling
item.description: Former WWE Women's Champion Alexa Bliss addressed the challenges faced by celebrities entering professional wrestling, using her own experience as a reference. During an exclusive interview with TMZ S...

item.title: MTN chair warns xenophobic violence undermines Africa’s economic integration
item.description: Mcebisi Jonas, MTN Group chair, warned that anti-immigrant violence in South Africa is undermining continental economic integration and growth. Speaking at the Kgalema Motlanthe Foundation’s Winter Se...

item.title: Top Cartoons from July 24, 2026
item.description: The article features a curated selection of political cartoons published on July 24, 2026, highlighting satirical commentary on current events and public figures. The collection, titled 'Best of Carto...

item.title: Airtel Africa's Customer Base Surpasses 189 Million, Revenue Rises 31% in Q1
item.description: Airtel Africa reported a 31% revenue surge to KSh 239.93 billion in Q1 2026, driven by a 11.6% growth in its customer base to 189 million across Africa. Data users increased to 87.3 million, with netw...

item.title: Tanzania Needs Innovation and Leadership to Achieve $1 Trillion Economy Goal by 2050
item.description: The article discusses the urgent need for Tanzanian public institutions to move away from traditional practices and adopt innovative, accountable leadership to meet the country's economic goals. Minis...

item.title: Analysts Agree with Fox News on Trump's Negative Polling Impact
item.description: A recent Fox News poll has delivered devastating news to Republicans, leaving a panel of MS NOW experts stunned that they agreed with the conservative network's assessment of President Donald Trump. T...

item.title: Fire Destroys Part of Commercial Building in Lagos
item.description: An early morning fire broke out at a commercial building in the Akowonjo area of Lagos State, destroying parts of the structure. The incident occurred around Jimoh Bus Stop, Egbeda-Akowonjo, and invol...

item.title: Italy seeks extradition of Toronto man accused of mob ties
item.description: Carlo Bruzzese, a 41-year-old Toronto-area resident, faces potential extradition to Italy after being arrested by Canadian authorities. Italian prosecutors allege he is a high-ranking member of the Ca...

item.title: Saudi nuclear deal tied to Abraham Accords participation with Israel
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated that the proposed US-Saudi civil nuclear agreement will only be approved if Saudi Arabia normalises relations with Israel by joining the Abraham Accords. The deal, whi...

item.title: Manchester Synagogue Attack: Police Fail to Examine Suspect's Devices Before Tragedy
item.description: A senior police chief has apologised after admitting mobile devices seized from the Manchester synagogue attacker were not examined before the fatal attack. Jihad Al-Shamie, 35, was on bail for an all...

item.title: Deputy PM Ishaq Dar highlights global challenges at Asean forum, including Kashmir and IWT disputes
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar addressed the Asean Regional Forum (ARF) ministerial meeting, emphasizing Kashmir and the Indus Water Treaty (IWT) as critical global challenges threatening regional pe...
